_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Prepare COAs to address CCIR events.
reference_document_element_description: Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by applicable data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and AI system registrations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.334), RC-T-011 (RC, cosine: 0.318).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.374). Shared vocabulary: [prepare]. DCWF-only terms [address, ccir, coas, events] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.887, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.0%). "Prepare COAs to address CCIR events." and "Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.348 ≈ STS 0.374 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [prepare] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [prepare]. DCWF-only: [address, ccir, coas, events]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings].
